blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 52°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 27°F.
